sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 71 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.4, 27 & 30. 2. For orders on CMA No.1465/2024. 3. For orders on CMA No.1466/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 03.02.2026 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending under objections since 2024. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Applicant has not made any effort to get the matter listed in two years. Be that as it may, office objections remain to be complied since inception and the same is the case even today. Counsel for the applicant has no justification why needful has not been done and merely seeks time. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
